name: Agent LLM Observability
description: LLM generation volume, latency, errors, token usage, and cost recorded through Agent Native tracking as PostHog-compatible `$ai_generation` events. Source: first-party analytics_events.

panels.title: LLM Generations (30d)
panels.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = '$ai_generation' AND event_date >= to_char(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days', 'YYYY-MM-DD')

config.description: Agent LLM generation events emitted by core observability tracking over the last 30 days.

panels.title: LLM Cost (30d)
panels.sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> '$ai_total_cost_usd', '')::float, NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> 'cost_usd', '')::float, COALESCE(NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> 'cost_cents_x100', '')::float, 0) / 10000.0)), 0) AS cost_usd FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = '$ai_generation' AND event_date >= to_char(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days', 'YYYY-MM-DD')

config.description: Estimated provider spend from tracked LLM generation events.

panels.title: Avg LLM Latency (30d)
panels.sql: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(COALESCE(NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> 'duration_ms', '')::float, NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> '$ai_latency', '')::float * 1000.0)), 0) AS latency_ms FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = '$ai_generation' AND event_date >= to_char(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days', 'YYYY-MM-DD')

config.description: Average agent loop latency for tracked LLM generations.

panels.title: LLM Error Rate (30d)
panels.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE lower(COALESCE(properties::jsonb ->> '$ai_is_error', properties::jsonb ->> 'status', '')) IN ('true', 'error'))::float / COUNT(*) END AS rate FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = '$ai_generation' AND event_date >= to_char(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days', 'YYYY-MM-DD')

config.description: Share of tracked LLM generations that ended in an error status.

panels.title: LLM Cost Over Time by App
panels.sql: SELECT event_date AS date, COALESCE(NULLIF(app, ''), NULLIF(template, ''), 'unknown') AS app, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> '$ai_total_cost_usd', '')::float, NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> 'cost_usd', '')::float, COALESCE(NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> 'cost_cents_x100', '')::float, 0) / 10000.0)), 0) AS cost_usd FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = '$ai_generation' AND event_date >= to_char(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days', 'YYYY-MM-DD') GROUP BY event_date, COALESCE(NULLIF(app, ''), NULLIF(template, ''), 'unknown') ORDER BY date, app

config.description: Daily estimated LLM cost stacked by emitting app/template.

panels.title: LLM Cost by Model
panels.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> '$ai_model', ''), NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> 'model', ''), 'unknown') AS model, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> '$ai_total_cost_usd', '')::float, NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> 'cost_usd', '')::float, COALESCE(NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> 'cost_cents_x100', '')::float, 0) / 10000.0)), 0) AS cost_usd FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = '$ai_generation' AND event_date >= to_char(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days', 'YYYY-MM-DD') GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> '$ai_model', ''), NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> 'model', ''), 'unknown') ORDER BY cost_usd DESC LIMIT 20

config.description: Estimated LLM cost grouped by model over the last 30 days.

panels.title: LLM Tokens Over Time by Model
panels.sql: SELECT event_date AS date, COALESCE(NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> '$ai_model', ''), NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> 'model', ''), 'unknown') AS model, SUM(COALESCE(NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> '$ai_input_tokens', '')::float, NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> 'input_tokens', '')::float, 0) + COALESCE(NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> '$ai_output_tokens', '')::float, NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> 'output_tokens', '')::float, 0)) AS tokens FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = '$ai_generation' AND event_date >= to_char(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days', 'YYYY-MM-DD') GROUP BY event_date, COALESCE(NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> '$ai_model', ''), NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> 'model', ''), 'unknown') ORDER BY date, model

config.description: Input plus output tokens per day, stacked by model.

panels.title: LLM Latency by Model
panels.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> '$ai_model', ''), NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> 'model', ''), 'unknown') AS model, COALESCE(AVG(COALESCE(NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> 'duration_ms', '')::float, NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> '$ai_latency', '')::float * 1000.0)), 0) AS latency_ms FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = '$ai_generation' AND event_date >= to_char(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days', 'YYYY-MM-DD') GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> '$ai_model', ''), NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> 'model', ''), 'unknown') ORDER BY latency_ms DESC LIMIT 20

config.description: Average tracked LLM generation latency grouped by model.

panels.title: Top Expensive LLM Runs
panels.sql: SELECT timestamp, COALESCE(NULLIF(app, ''), NULLIF(template, ''), 'unknown') AS app, COALESCE(NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> '$ai_model', ''), NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> 'model', ''), 'unknown') AS model, COALESCE(NULLIF(user_id, ''), NULLIF(anonymous_id, ''), 'anonymous') AS user_key, COALESCE(NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> 'run_id', ''), NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> '$ai_trace_id', '')) AS run_id, ROUND((COALESCE(NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> '$ai_total_cost_usd', '')::float, NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> 'cost_usd', '')::float, COALESCE(NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> 'cost_cents_x100', '')::float, 0) / 10000.0))::numeric, 4) AS cost_usd, ROUND((COALESCE(NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> 'duration_ms', '')::float, NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> '$ai_latency', '')::float * 1000.0, 0))::numeric) AS duration_ms, COALESCE(NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> 'tool_calls', '')::int, 0) AS tool_calls FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = '$ai_generation' AND event_date >= to_char(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days', 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY cost_usd DESC LIMIT 25

config.description: Highest estimated-cost agent runs in the last 30 days.

panels.title: Recent LLM Errors
panels.sql: SELECT timestamp, COALESCE(NULLIF(app, ''), NULLIF(template, ''), 'unknown') AS app, COALESCE(NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> '$ai_model', ''), NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> 'model', ''), 'unknown') AS model, COALESCE(NULLIF(user_id, ''), NULLIF(anonymous_id, ''), 'anonymous') AS user_key, COALESCE(NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> 'run_id', ''), NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> '$ai_trace_id', '')) AS run_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> 'error_message', ''), NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> '$ai_error', ''), 'error') AS error FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = '$ai_generation' AND lower(COALESCE(properties::jsonb ->> '$ai_is_error', properties::jsonb ->> 'status', '')) IN ('true', 'error') ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 25

config.description: Most recent tracked LLM generation errors.
